speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: Hello everyone, today I am going to talk about the large language models commonly known

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: as LLMs.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: Large language models are the type of artificial intelligence designed to understand

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: ungenerated human language.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: They are built using deep learning techniques, especially neural networks called transformer

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: models.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: These models are trained on massive amounts of text data, such as books, articles, websites,

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: and conservations to learn patterns in language.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: An LLM does not actually think like humans.

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: Instead, it predicts the most likely next word based on a context of previous words.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: By doing this repeatedly, it can generate meaningful sentences, answer questions, summarize

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: documents, translate languages, and even write code.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: One popular example is chargeivity, which can assist users in learning, programming, writing

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: and problems-solving through natural conversations.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: LLMs are also used in virtual assistants, customer support chatboards, education platforms,

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: and content creation tools.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: However, LLMs also have the limitations.

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: They can sometimes produce incorrect information because they rely on patterns learned from

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: the data rather than real understanding.

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: Therefore, human verification is still important when using age-generated context.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: In futures, LLMs are expected to become more accurate, more efficient, and better at reasoning

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: on personalization.

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: They will likely play a major role in humans' interact with technology.

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: In conclusion, large-language models represent a significant step forward in artificial intelligence,

speaker: SPEAKER_00
text: enabling more natural communication between the humans and missions and opening new possibilities

speaker: SPEAKER_01
text: of an innovation.
